name: Orange Honey Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter, honey, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a mixer bowl.
2. Process at medium-low speed until well blended and fluffy.
3. Add the brandy, lemon zest, and orange zest to the mixture. Mix well.
4. Spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a large star tip.
5. Pipe rosettes onto parchment or waxed paper.
6. Chill until firm. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
